_meta.name: Independent marginal priors (no parents)
_meta.source: StatCounter GlobalStats + Firefox defaults + community data 2025-2026
_meta.note: Codec prefs (av1_enabled, webm_encoder_enabled, hw_video_decoding, wmf_enabled, ffvpx_enabled) moved to cpt_codec_given_class.json — they correlate with GPU class via Firefox version / user-tier distribution.

dark_theme._note: 0=light, 1=dark. StatCounter ~40% users report dark theme preference on desktop.
